name: fractal-reality
description: Plugins from the Circumpunct Framework by Ashman Roonz

plugins.name: circumpunct-ethics
plugins.description: Ethical reasoning and virtue diagnostics based on the Circumpunct Framework. Four pillars (Good, Right, True, Agreement) and four living virtues (Plasticity, Access, Curiosity, Validation) for evaluating decisions, detecting performed ethics, building steelmen, and restoring healthy ethical function. Created by Ashman Roonz.
